title: Gower Quest

startPoint.en: Talk to Andrew Gower at the cabbage farm south of Varrock, south-east of the Varrock lodestone.
startPoint.es: Habla con Andrew Gower en la granja de repollos al sur de Varrock, al sureste de la piedra de viaje de Varrock.

recommended.name: Food
recommended.display: Food and combat gear for the final battle

recommended.name: The Black Hole
recommended.display: Use the desktop version during The Black Hole Experience to find objects

kills: Black Knight Titan (scales to the player) six times

rewards.name: Brassica Prime Godsword
rewards.display: Brassica Prime Godsword two-handed melee weapon override

rewards.name: Black Knight Titan
rewards.display: Ability to have the old and graphically updated Black Knight Titan swap places

children.name: Speak to the Black Knight Titan in Behind the Scenes to toggle between his original and updated appearance.
children.display: Speak to the Black Knight Titan in Behind the Scenes to toggle between his original and updated appearance.

rewards.name: Tim (pet)
rewards.display: Tim and Crunchy follower pets, obtained by speaking to them in Behind the Scenes
250 experience lamp for use in a free-to-play skill, after speaking to Ian with level 10 or higher in all free-to-play skills
1,500 experience lamp for use in a free-to-play skill, after speaking to Paul with level 30 or higher in all free-to-play skills
12,000 experience lamp for use in a free-to-play skill, after speaking to Andrew with level 50 or higher in all free-to-play skills

rewards.name: The ability to reset the quest by searching a crate at the Gower Farm
rewards.display: The ability to reset the quest by searching a crate at the Gower Farm

children.display: This reset removes all quest rewards, including 1 quest point, unlike most replayable quests

text.en: Speak to the Gowers at their farm next to rats and a cabbage patch south-east of the Varrock lodestone.
text.es: Habla con los Gower en su granja junto a las ratas y un campo de repollos al sureste de la piedra de viaje de Varrock.

chatOptions: 1 So about that quest, then?
Accept

text.en: Search the crate in the room to the west to obtain pure essence.
text.es: Registra la caja en la sala al oeste para obtener pure essence.

text.en: Search the largest water barrel to the west of the southern entrance to obtain a brussels sprout.
text.es: Registra el barril de agua más grande al oeste de la entrada sur para obtener un brussels sprout.

text.en: Search the scarecrow in the south-western part of the farm with the cabbages to obtain a cruciferous mounting.
text.es: Registra el espantapájaros en la parte suroeste de la granja con los repollos para obtener un cruciferous mounting.

text.en: Search the food trough on the east side of the farm in the area with the giant rats to obtain a broccoli root.
text.es: Registra el comedero en el lado este de la granja en el área con las ratas gigantes para obtener un broccoli root.

text.en: Spin the broccoli root into broccoli string on the spinning wheel in the main room.
text.es: Hila el broccoli root para convertirlo en broccoli string en la rueca de la sala principal.

text.en: Use the brussels sprout on the cruciferous mounting to make it into an unstrung brassican amulet.
text.es: Usa el brussels sprout en el cruciferous mounting para convertirlo en un unstrung brassican amulet.

text.en: Use the "Flip" option on the pure essence to turn it into a life rune.
text.es: Usa la opción "Flip" en el pure essence para convertirlo en una life rune.

text.en: Use the broccoli string on the unstrung brassican amulet to create a brassican amulet.
text.es: Usa el broccoli string en el unstrung brassican amulet para crear un brassican amulet.

text.en: Use the life rune on the brassican amulet to enchant it into a cabbagespeak amulet.
text.es: Usa la life rune en el brassican amulet para encantarlo y convertirlo en un cabbagespeak amulet.

text.en: Equip the amulet and talk to Crispy the Cabbage south-west on the cabbage field.
text.es: Equípate el amulet y habla con Crispy the Cabbage al suroeste en el campo de repollos.

text.en: Talk to the Gower brothers inside of the house.
text.es: Habla con los hermanos Gower dentro de la casa.

chatOptions: Any

text.en: Speak to the Cabbages again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con los Cabbages.

text.en: Speak to Andrew to receive the disk of returning.
text.es: Habla con Andrew para recibir el disk of returning.

text.en: Armour, weapon, and food (Note: keep 6-7 free spaces)
text.es: Armadura, arma y comida (Nota: mantén 6-7 espacios libres)

text.en: Go to Dwarven Mines (entrance north-east of Falador lodestone).
text.es: Ve a Dwarven Mines (entrada al noreste de la piedra de viaje de Falador).

text.en: Go to the "room" just before the south-westernmost one (Boot will be in the area).
text.es: Ve a la "sala" justo antes de la más suroeste (Boot estará en el área).

text.en: Scan with the disk of returning.
text.es: Escanea con el disk of returning.

text.en: The room is intentionally black. Move your cursor around to find the hidden objects:
text.es: La sala está intencionalmente oscura. Mueve el cursor para encontrar los objetos ocultos:

text.en: Search the table for a rock.
text.es: Registra la mesa para obtener una rock.

text.en: Use the rock on the wall to the northwest.
text.es: Usa la rock en la pared al noroeste.

text.en: Right click on the table to look under it for an orange.
text.es: Haz clic derecho en la mesa para mirar debajo y encontrar una orange.

text.en: Eat the orange for a key.
text.es: Come la orange para obtener una key.

text.en: Use the small key on the bumpy wall on the right for a tinderbox.
text.es: Usa la small key en la pared irregular a la derecha para obtener un tinderbox.

text.en: Use the tinderbox on the scary wispy thing and take the skull.
text.es: Usa el tinderbox en la cosa vaporosa y aterradora y toma el skull.

text.en: Use the skull on the unusual shape to the west.
text.es: Usa el skull en la forma inusual al oeste.

text.en: Enter The Gate of Lloigh-enn.
text.es: Entra por The Gate of Lloigh-enn.

text.en: Talk to Thordur.
text.es: Habla con Thordur.

chatOptions: Any
Any
1 Off I go, then.

text.en: Talk to Spiral Orb (the purple spider DJ in the middle).
text.es: Habla con Spiral Orb (la araña morada DJ en el centro).

chatOptions: 1 What's up with the cabbage patches?
2 I'll take a look around myself.

text.en: Look around in this area for 3 NPCs: Lucien, Steve the Chaos Elemental, and Thok.
text.es: Busca por esta área a 3 NPCs: Lucien, Steve the Chaos Elemental y Thok.

text.en: You can complete the following in any order.
text.es: Puedes completar lo siguiente en cualquier orden.

text.en: Talk to Lucien, north-west of spiral orb and next to central bank portal.
text.es: Habla con Lucien, al noroeste de Spiral Orb y junto al Central Bank Portal.

chatOptions: 2 Can you help me fix the life altar?
3 Not much, man.

text.en: Enter the Central Bank Portal.
text.es: Entra por el Central Bank Portal.

text.en: Talk to Claire Hick.
text.es: Habla con Claire Hick.

text.en: Talk to Ernie.
text.es: Habla con Ernie.

text.en: Check out the Locked Vault Door.
text.es: Echa un vistazo a la Locked Vault Door.

text.en: Leave the area.
text.es: Abandona el área.

text.en: Talk to Sphenishchev, located south of the portal next to the bar, the penguin next to Beastmaster Durzag.
text.es: Habla con Sphenishchev, ubicado al sur del portal junto al bar, el pingüino junto a Beastmaster Durzag.

chatOptions: 2 Will you help me break into the bank?

text.en: Talk to Tim or Crunchy, just south-west of Spiral Orb (the DJ).
text.es: Habla con Tim o Crunchy, justo al suroeste de Spiral Orb (el DJ).

chatOptions: 3 Will you help me break into the bank?

text.en: Ask the bartender for 5 cups of tea and hand them out to all 5 Environment artists around the bar.
text.es: Pide al camarero 5 tazas de té y repártelas entre los 5 artistas de entorno alrededor del bar.

text.en: Return to Tim and Crunchy.
text.es: Regresa con Tim y Crunchy.

chatOptions: 1 Everyone's been watered!

text.en: Talk to Romeo, southeast of Beastmaster Durzag.
text.es: Habla con Romeo, al sureste de Beastmaster Durzag.

chatOptions: 2 Will you help me break into the bank?
2 I'll see who I can find.

text.en: Talk to each God Wars Boss to the east.
text.es: Habla con cada God Wars Boss al este.

text.en: Commander Zilyana
text.es: Commander Zilyana

text.en: K'ril Tsutsaroth
text.es: K'ril Tsutsaroth

text.en: General Graardoor
text.es: General Graardoor

text.en: Kree'arra
text.es: Kree'arra

text.en: Nex
text.es: Nex

text.en: Return to Romeo.
text.es: Regresa con Romeo.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, some people had ideas.

text.en: Talk to Guthix, south of the bar.
text.es: Habla con Guthix, al sur del bar.

chatOptions: 2 Will you help me break into the bank?

text.en: Talk to one of the cabbages on the north-side of the bar.
text.es: Habla con uno de los cabbages en el lado norte del bar.

text.en: Return to Guthix.
text.es: Regresa con Guthix.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, they're very interested in working with you!

text.en: Enter the Central Bank Portal.
text.es: Entra por el Central Bank Portal.

text.en: Talk to Claire Hick.
text.es: Habla con Claire Hick.

text.en: Talk to Ernie.
text.es: Habla con Ernie.

chatOptions: 1 I have someone who wants to speak to you.

text.en: Check out the locked vault door, then enter it.
text.es: Echa un vistazo a la locked vault door, luego entra por ella.

text.en: Open the Bank Safety box, then search it for a fragment.
text.es: Abre la Bank Safety box, luego regístrala para obtener un fragment.

text.en: Leave the bank area.
text.es: Abandona el área del banco.

text.en: Talk to Chaos Elemental, north of the Grand Exchange Maintenance, southwest of the bar.
text.es: Habla con Chaos Elemental, al norte de Grand Exchange Maintenance, al suroeste del bar.

chatOptions: 2 Can you help me fix the life altar?
2 NO! No, thank you.
3 Goodbye Steve!

text.en: Enter the Grand Exchange Maintenance portal.
text.es: Entra por el portal de Grand Exchange Maintenance.

text.en: Repair the Grand Exchange pipes. (there are 3 different thickness pipes, each size must fit each other from the beginning to the end, the interface will close when it's correct)
text.es: Repara las tuberías de Grand Exchange. (hay 3 tuberías de distinto grosor, cada tamaño debe encajar con el siguiente desde el principio hasta el final, la interfaz se cerrará cuando esté correcto)

text.en: Leave the Grand Exchange area
text.es: Abandona el área de Grand Exchange.

text.en: Talk to Thok, just north-west of Clawdia.
text.es: Habla con Thok, justo al noroeste de Clawdia.

chatOptions: 2 Can you help me fix the life altar?

text.en: Enter Beta Room Portal and talk to Max.
text.es: Entra por el Beta Room Portal y habla con Max.

chatOptions: Any
2 I'll get right on with that then.

text.en: Max all 3 skills.
text.es: Sube al máximo las 3 habilidades.

text.en: First room: You get options to rock, trot, gallop, turn. Just click on the action displayed on top of the screen.
text.es: Primera sala: se te darán opciones de rock, trot, gallop, turn. Simplemente haz clic en la acción que se muestre en la parte superior de la pantalla.

text.en: Second room: Fire at other battleships (searching desert island and bubbles give more xp too).
text.es: Segunda sala: dispara a otros barcos de guerra (registrar la isla desierta y las burbujas también da más experiencia).

text.en: Third room: Stay inside the bank on the white floor tiles.
text.es: Tercera sala: permanece dentro del banco sobre las baldosas blancas del suelo.

text.en: Talk to Max for the third fragment.
text.es: Habla con Max para obtener el tercer fragment.

text.en: Leave the area.
text.es: Abandona el área.

text.en: Enter the Life Altar Portal south, opposite of the Beta Room Portal.
text.es: Entra por el Life Altar Portal al sur, enfrente del Beta Room Portal.

text.en: Investigate Life altar.
text.es: Investiga el Life altar.

text.en: Speak with the Black Knight Titan.
text.es: Habla con el Black Knight Titan.

chatOptions: 4 Can we just get on with the boss fight?

text.en: Kill it 6 times. 3 Before cutscene, 3 after.
text.es: Mátalo 6 veces. 3 antes de la escena cinemática, 3 después.

text.en: Talk to any of the brothers.
text.es: Habla con cualquiera de los hermanos.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
